name: Tiny Validation Mission
goal: Validate MissionSpec JSON loading and round-tripping for this repository.
definition_of_done: python3 -m pytest tests/test_spec.py -q exits with code 0

tasks.title: Validate tiny MissionSpec artifact
tasks.description: Load this JSON into MissionSpec, round-trip it through to_dict(), and confirm launch validation passes.
acceptance_criteria: artifacts/tiny-validation-mission.json loads with json.load without errors
MissionSpec.from_dict(...).to_dict() round-trip preserves exactly one task and validate(stage='launch') returns []
